level_signals: Lead cross-functional initiatives across Product, Engineering, Design, Research, Data Science, and GTM organizations
Defining contribution framework for 7+ contributing teams

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7–10+ years of product management experience, including ownership of technically complex or platform-oriented products.
must_haves.qualifier: including ownership of technically complex or platform-oriented products

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building AI-powered products, conversational interfaces, workflow automation systems, or agentic experiences.
Strong technical depth with the ability to partner closely with engineers on systems architecture, orchestration, integrations, and scalability.
Track record of building customer-facing products on top of sophisticated backend or platform systems.
Experience leading ambiguous, cross-functional initiatives with multiple stakeholders and contributing teams.
Strong customer empathy and ability to translate complex workflows into intuitive product experiences.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, including experience influencing senior leadership.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience in marketing technology, SaaS platforms, productivity tooling, or AI copilots is a strong plus.
Familiarity with evaluation systems, AI quality frameworks, or LLM-powered experiences is a plus.

scope.surface: Native Composer — Klaviyo's in-app AI assistant and marketing orchestration experience across conversational UX, sub-agent orchestration, sidebars, inline assistance, floating action buttons, and full-page workflows
primary_metrics_inferred: Adoption and retention of AI-powered workflows
Agent quality and workflow success rates
Expansion of Composer into native product surfaces
core_responsibilities: Define and own the product vision and roadmap for Native Composer
Own the end-to-end in-app AI assistant experience including conversational UX and sub-agent orchestration
Partner with Engineering and Design to translate marketer workflows into scalable agentic experiences
Define the contribution framework for skills and agents across 7+ contributing teams
Drive convergence between Native Composer and Standalone Composer
Improve reliability, usability, and effectiveness of AI-powered workflows
Partner with GTM teams to shape product positioning, packaging, and go-to-market execution
Engage directly with customers to understand emerging workflows and adoption drivers
Define and track key product and operational metrics
Lead cross-functional initiatives across Product, Engineering, Design, Research, Data Science, and GTM
Communicate product strategy, tradeoffs, and execution priorities to stakeholders and executive leadership

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as part of total compensation package

green_flags: Clear product surface and ownership area (Native Composer)
Explicitly encourages close-but-not-exact candidates to apply
High strategic visibility — team sits at intersection of AI systems, product experience, platform architecture, and GTM
Exciting and well-defined product domain (agentic AI for marketing)
red_flags: 5 days/week in-office requirement in Boston — eliminates remote and hybrid candidates entirely
Highly ambiguous environment with 7+ contributing teams may signal organizational complexity or coordination overhead
Broad base salary range ($168K–$252K) makes it difficult to assess target level without recruiter conversation
Up to 10% travel required on top of full-time onsite

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years range, comp, and cross-functional scope; not explicitly stated)
seniority.manages_people (not explicitly stated; inferred as false from IC-style responsibilities)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not listed explicitly as KPIs in JD)
location.visa_sponsorship (not mentioned in JD; marked unclear)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'cost of labor across various U.S. geographic markets' language)
ambiguities: The JD states '7–10+ years' which creates ambiguity about whether 7 is the floor or whether 10+ is the true expectation; treated minimum_value as 7.
Total compensation mentions annual cash bonus, equity, and sign-on but no specific ranges are given beyond base salary.
Visa sponsorship is neither offered nor denied; marked as 'unclear'.
